steps.t: Bósi is in the Chamber of the Cross-roads, located off Durin's Way. Bróin has told you to speak with his uncle about the Water-wheels of Nalâ-dûm.
The entrance to Nalâ-dûm can be found in the Water-works of Moria. Bósi reports that a relic of Gorothúl's lies among the Water-wheels of Nalâ-dûm and…
Bósi is in the Chamber of the Cross-roads, located off Durin's Way. You have destroyed the relic left in Nalâ-dûm by Gorothúl and should report your s…
